name: Broken Diamond IR Report
query:
SELECT
    recv.name AS "Jangad No",
    recv.creation AS "Transaction Date",
    issue.department AS "From Department",
    recv.department AS "To Department",
    issue_emp.employee_name AS "From Manager",

    shape.attribute_value AS "Shape",
    purity.attribute_value AS "Purity",
    size.attribute_value AS "Size",
    size_mm.attribute_value AS "Size MM",

    recv_eiro.diamond_pcs AS "Pcs",
    recv_eiro.diamond_wt AS "Weight",

    CASE
        WHEN se_received.name IS NOT NULL THEN 'Received'
        ELSE 'Transit'
    END AS "Status",

    issue_emp.employee_name AS "Issue Confirm Employee",
    recv_emp.employee_name AS "Receive Confirm Employee",
    issue.creation AS "Issue Date",
    recv.creation AS "Receive Date"

FROM `tabEmployee IR` recv

INNER JOIN `tabEmployee IR Operation` recv_eiro
    ON recv_eiro.parent = recv.name

LEFT JOIN `tabStock Entry` se
    ON se.employee_ir = recv.name
   AND se.docstatus = 1

LEFT JOIN `tabStock Entry` se_received
    ON se_received.outgoing_stock_entry = se.name
   AND se_received.docstatus = 1

LEFT JOIN `tabEmployee` recv_emp
    ON recv_emp.name = recv.employee

LEFT JOIN `tabEmployee IR Operation` issue_eiro
    ON issue_eiro.manufacturing_operation = recv_eiro.manufacturing_operation
   AND issue_eiro.manufacturing_work_order = recv_eiro.manufacturing_work_order

LEFT JOIN `tabEmployee IR` issue
    ON issue.name = issue_eiro.parent
   AND issue.type = 'Issue'

LEFT JOIN `tabEmployee` issue_emp
    ON issue_emp.name = issue.employee

LEFT JOIN `tabManufacturing Work Order` mwo
    ON mwo.name = recv_eiro.manufacturing_work_order

LEFT JOIN `tabItem Variant Attribute` shape
    ON shape.parent = mwo.item_code
   AND shape.attribute LIKE CONCAT('%', 'Shape', '%')

LEFT JOIN `tabItem Variant Attribute` purity
    ON purity.parent = mwo.item_code
   AND purity.attribute LIKE CONCAT('%', 'Purity', '%')

LEFT JOIN `tabItem Variant Attribute` size
    ON size.parent = mwo.item_code
   AND size.attribute LIKE CONCAT('%', 'Size', '%')

LEFT JOIN `tabItem Variant Attribute` size_mm
    ON size_mm.parent = mwo.item_code
   AND size_mm.attribute LIKE CONCAT('%', 'MM', '%')

WHERE recv.type = 'Receive'

ORDER BY recv.creation DESC;

roles.role: Computer Aided Designing – South Zone Manager - MUM
Computer Aided Designing – PAN India Manager - MUM
